inputs.name: headingLevel
inputs.description:
The heading level (h1-h6) for the dynamic page title.
Determines the semantic hierarchy for accessibility and SEO.

inputs.name: subtitle
inputs.description: The subtitle text displayed below the title in the dynamic page header.

inputs.name: subtitleHeadingLevel
inputs.description:
The heading level (h1-h6) for the dynamic page subtitle.
When provided, the subtitle will be rendered as a semantic heading with role="heading".
When not provided (undefined/null), the subtitle is rendered as plain text without a heading role.

inputs.name: subtitleWrap
inputs.description: Whether the subtitle text should wrap to multiple lines instead of truncating with ellipsis.

inputs.name: title
inputs.description: The title text displayed in the dynamic page header.

inputs.name: titleId
inputs.description:
The unique ID for the dynamic page title element.
Used for ARIA relationships and programmatic reference.

inputs.name: titleWrap
inputs.description: Whether the title text should wrap to multiple lines instead of truncating with ellipsis.
